title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
problem_statement: Given an unsorted array of integers nums, return the length of the longest consecutive elements sequence.

examples.explanation: The sequence [1,2,3,4] is the longest consecutive subsequence.
The numbers 0 through 8 form a consecutive run.

intuition: Only start counting from numbers that do not have a predecessor. Use a set for fast membership tests.

approaches.name: HashSet Scan
approaches.description: Put all numbers into a set and expand each sequence from its smallest element.

interview_qa.q: Why only start from sequence heads?
interview_qa.a: Starting from a number with a predecessor duplicates work. Heads ensure each sequence is counted once.
Yes. Each element is processed a constant number of times, since sequences are only traversed from their starts.
